## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX and LightSource partnership, discuss content strategy and implementation plan for a potential 90-day pilot engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy and execution sprint, aiming to publish daily content by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [LightSource is migrating to Framer, with new site launch expected in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Proposed kickoff date: September 2nd, with content publishing to begin mid-September](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [Initial engagement: $20K for 8 weeks, with potential for continued growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Content Strategy Process

  - [Develop personas and archetypes based on audience research](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Create content strategy with work streams and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Generate extensive content backlog (e.g., 4197 assignments for Engine)](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Publish daily, aiming for 47+ pieces in 10 weeks (including onboarding)](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Use AI-powered research and writing tools, with human editors for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)

### LightSource Current State and Needs

  - [Ben has existing content calendar and competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Looking to increase volume and diversify content types (e.g., guides, worksheets)](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Migrating website to Framer, opportunity to reformat blog](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Interest in developing more dynamic content layouts and additional resources (e.g., glossary)](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

### Implementation and Workflow

  - [GrowthX handles end-to-end content production, including imagery and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Initial focus on shorter, high-quality pieces to build domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Potential for longer-form content and additional resources in later stages](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [GrowthX can assist with CMS migration and technical setup if needed](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Aim to sign agreement before the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [GrowthX needs at least one week for preparation](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [LightSource to ensure new site is ready to receive content (est. 1st or 2nd week of September)](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [8-week engagement starts from kickoff, not including prep week](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Confirm September 2nd kickoff date](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [LightSource to sign agreement (Spencer as signer)](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1956.0)
  - [GrowthX to send detailed engagement information](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
  - [Ben to ensure LightSource site is ready for content by mid-September](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [Schedule deep dive into GrowthX's content production process and capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/cnnV4NjLhAzDNYxXXxnQktM94yjFsrVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
